caption: Figure 4.2. Operating Capacity under the FIT Scheme
description: A stacked bar chart showing the operating capacity in MW for various biomass sources under the FIT scheme from 2012-13 to 2020. Categories include Waste materials, Biogas, Construction wood waste, General wood (10MW≤), General wood (<10MW), Unutilised wood (2MW≤), and Unutilised wood (<2MW).
